stemHtml: Appropriate actions of crew members can minimise the consequences of acts of unlawful interference if the operator…

options.a: establishes effective corrective action after each unlawful incident.
options.b: establishes and maintains an approved security training programme.
options.c: includes, for each flight, law enforcement officers or in-flight security officers carrying weapons.
options.d: provides crew members with adequate training for using weapons, if these are authorised for carriage onboard.
